## [00:00 - 02:01]

Welcome to module four. This is where we really get down the brass tacks and we talk about what you actually cover on your webinar. A lot of people have a lot of anxiety about this so we're going to take care of that for you. Then what's a module for and why do they need to pay attention to this? All right so what we're going to do here is we're going to work on the actual scripting of your webinar. It's going to be in two modules. This module we're going to focus on the content portion. The part where you transform their lives as well as set them up and have their mindset be appropriate to be willing to buy from you when we're done with that. So Jeff I bet you you were like me that when you first started doing webinars way too much content and oftentimes you probably ran out of time to be able to properly sell them right for sure. So what we're going to do here is we're going to help you figure out exactly the best things to teach them. How to do that and more importantly there's a lot of the psychology of selling that happens in this content portion. It's not just teach something and then sell them something. We build the psychology all the way through and so we're going to guide you through and hold your hand through that process so that you build them and build that psychology in before you get to the point where they're ready to hear your offer. So that's what we're going to do in this particular module. You're going to love it because this is the part that you're going to really get excited because you get to change people's lives. Like Dan said I think almost everyone makes this mistake when they start out is the balance of the teaching versus the offer and really it's a false dichotomy because when you do this right when you follow this formula you're going to be building to that sale all the way through your content. So you're going to be be super helpful you're going to be building value but you're also going to be setting up to make that offer and that's what you're going to get in module 4.
